meta.notes: T1+T2 in session 1 (single bash call, 15:01:56–15:09:58 UTC); T3+T4 initially failed (dc_solutions 403 → scraper_one AV1 no audio), rerun in session 2 (single bash call, 15:21:09–15:34:12 UTC). T3/T4 rerun succeeded: dc_solutions delivered h264 on second attempt. tool_calls_s = T1+T2+T3_rerun+T4_rerun (failed T3/T4 attempts excluded). Sub-stage timings: s1_apify/s1_download/s2_whisper/s3_llm confirmed from --dev stderr markers; s1_face_s and s4s5s6_per_clip_avg_s derived from totals. AV1 hw decode unavailable on devbox — h264 mmco warnings non-critical. Token delta covers both session windows (CC orchestration overhead only; skill S3 LLM calls via Anthropic proxy not in CC JSONL). T4 clips_requested=5, clips_returned=4 (LLM found 4 viable segments; pikabot found 3 on same video — model non-determinism).

execution.notes: execution.total_s = T1+T2+T3+T4 (340.709+0.196+371.103+412.317). T3 and T4 first attempts failed (dc_solutions 403 + scraper_one AV1; ~142s wasted, excluded from total). T4 dominated (412.3s): 4 clips × ~83s/clip = ~332s S4-S7. T3 per-clip slightly slower (~94s) vs T1/T4 (~83s) — likely face trajectory variance (T3 clip1 is longer: 59s vs 45s). T2 cache hit 0.196s confirms f4f6db0 caching works. Apify S1 timing: T1=50s, T3=50s, T4=36s (consistent with pikabot 36-52s range).

delivery.notes: 10 clips uploaded across T1(3)+T3(3)+T4(4). T2 cache hit, no re-upload. upload_s ~50s estimated (10 clips × ~5s/clip). output_size_kb ~39MB estimated (10 clips × ~3.9MB/clip). output_url = T1 clip 1 CDN URL.
